positive: Stylized minimalist celestial forest scene. A central, symmetrical composition featuring lush, stylized bioluminescent flora and gracefully curved tree silhouettes against a deep indigo night sky. The ground is covered in geometric constellations and softly glowing crystal elements. Include subtle rainbow diffraction patterns around the primary silhouettes. Style: high contrast vector illustration combined with ethereal watercolor wash, suitable for screen printing. Composition: central, circular arrangement, negative space is crucial. Lighting: dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the outline of leaves and branches. Color Palette: Deep sapphire blue, vibrant teal, amethyst purple, with accents of luminous gold and emerald green. Print-friendly: clean lines, distinct color blocking, suitable for DTG or apparel transfer.
negative: blurry, noisy, low quality, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, lettering, dirty, cartoonish, realistic photo, messy, extra limbs, poor anatomy, gradient wash (for details), bad composition
